category.description: Only return warnings in this category (e.g. 'size', 'merge', 'event'). Warnings from producers that don't yet emit a category have category 'unknown'.

limit.description: Maximum number of warning types to return (default 100).

order_by.description:
Sort order for warning types: 'count' (most frequent first, the default) or 'last_seen' (most recent first).

* `count` - count
* `last_seen` - last_seen

q.description: Only return warnings whose type or details contain this substring (case-sensitive). Useful for finding warnings about a specific distinct ID, event or property.

samples.description: Maximum number of recent sample warnings to return per warning type (default 5).

severity.description:
Only return warnings with this severity. Warnings from producers that don't yet emit a severity have severity 'warning'.

* `info` - info
* `warning` - warning
* `error` - error

since.description: Start of the time range, as an ISO 8601 datetime (e.g. '2026-07-01T00:00:00Z') or a relative duration (e.g. '-24h', '-7d'). Defaults to 24 hours ago. Warnings are retained for 90 days.

type.description: Only return warnings of this type (e.g. 'message_size_too_large', 'cannot_merge_already_identified').

until.description: End of the time range, as an ISO 8601 datetime or a relative duration (e.g. '-1h'). Defaults to now.
